reasoning_top2: Large nationally-representative DHS sample (n=4493) with OR=2.70, tight 95% CI (1.56–4.66), and p<.001 gives a robust, well-powered association unlikely to be noise.
Claim is associational not causal; religion strongly confounds with region in Nigeria, but the descriptive Muslim-vs-others IPTp difference should replicate in similar DHS data.
